chat.heroTagline: Text-based conversations with your AI garden assistant
chat.introBody: I'm a friendly garden bee who loves talking about pollinators, permaculture, seed saving, and the small wonders of nature. Ask me anything in English, Spanish or French — I'll meet you where you are.
chat.tip1: 🌻 Why bees love sunflowers and lavender
chat.tip2: 🍅 How to grow tomatoes the way they did in El Bierzo
chat.tip3: 🌱 What happens to a seed in your hand
chat.tip4: 🐝 What I do when it rains in the garden
chat.openIntroductionAria: Show what Mochi can help with

notFound.lostInGarden: Oops! This page doesn't exist in our garden
notFound.explanation: Maybe a bee carried it off — or you typed an address that's no longer a flower. Let's head back to the part of the garden where things are blooming.

songs.heroSubtitle: Listen with Mochi or sing it yourself!
songs.heroExplanation: Each song has a sung version and an instrumental version. Switch the language to hear the other version!
songs.footerHint: Switch the site language to hear the songs in another language!
